rows.label: qev080101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nnmooo! Kupi is so curious mo! What in
the world is this key mo?! And what exactly
is the Riddle Alien's treasure mo?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Kupi won't be able to sleep at night like this
mo... Say, why don't you try to solve the mystery
left behind by the Riddle Alien with Kupi mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for more details about the treasure.

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what a Riddle Alien is.

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0003
rows.name:
It seems to be something you
can get with this key the
Riddle Alien gave Kupi mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0004
rows.name:
According to the Riddle Alien, it's supposed to
be something incredibly amazing, but... what the
treasure actually is, is also a riddle mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0005
rows.name:
They are the aliens who gave
this mysterious key to Kupi mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Earthlings, those huge guys... Various aliens
have come to Mira, but Kupi has never seen
an alien so full of mysteries before mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0007
rows.name:
That's why Kupi calls
them Riddle Aliens mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0008
rows.name:
It seems the Riddle Alien came to planet
Mira with several companions mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0009
rows.name:
But their bodies didn't seem very strong.
It looks like everyone died except for
the one who made it to the caravan mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Kupi felt sorry for them, so
Kupi gave the last surviving
Riddle Alien some food mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then, as thanks for the food,
they gave Kupi this key and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0012
rows.name:
"Beyond where our companions sleep in this
land, we shall hide a great treasure that
will destroy the world and let it be reborn."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0013
rows.name:
...They said something weird
like that and then left mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Are you super curious mo? Can't sleep mo? Ufufu... Now
you are a riddle companion too mo. If you want to feel
refreshed, let's search for the treasure together mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Then Kupi will tell you the riddles right away
mo! It seems "our companions sleeping in this
land" are three places in Shiraki no Tairiku mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0016
rows.name:
And the Riddle Alien also
taught Kupi riddles about the
locations where they are mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0017
rows.name:
The first is "South of the lake, beside the four turtles." The second is
"In the bosom of the flightless giant bird gazing at the southern fortress."
The third is "At the foot of the lost mountain, overlooking the lake."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Kupi doesn't understand
it at all mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Kupi will overheat if Kupi thinks about it any
more mo. The rest is up to you to use trial and
error and solve the mystery of the treasure mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Did you forget the riddles the
Riddle Alien taught Kupi mo? If
so, Kupi will tell you again mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0031
rows.name: Listen to Kupi's explanation of the riddles.

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0041
rows.name: Say that you remember them, so there is no need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0021
rows.name:
The whereabouts of "our companions
sleeping in this land" are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0022
rows.name:
The first is "South of the lake, beside the four turtles." The second is
"In the bosom of the flightless giant bird gazing at the southern fortress."
The third is "At the foot of the lost mountain, overlooking the lake."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0023
rows.name:
...It seems to be in those places mo.
They are apparently in Shiraki no Tairiku,
so looking far away is useless mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0024
rows.name: Your excellent memory is so reliable mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ah... Come to think of it, Kupi
forgot mo. The Riddle Alien said
one more riddle-like thing mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0026
rows.name:
"Our treasure... It may be something
that you all already possess..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0027
rows.name:
...That's what they said mo. But Kupi
and the others don't have anything scary
that would destroy the world mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Aaaah! Mysteries call for more mysteries,
and Kupi's head is spinning. Kupi's brain
feels like it's going to melt mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0029
rows.name:
How was it mo? Is the elucidation of the
Riddle Alien's mystery progressing mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0030
rows.name:
...Eh? There were three graves
in Shiraki no Tairiku mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0031
rows.name:
"Our companions sleeping in this
land"... Indeed, the Riddle Aliens
might be sleeping inside the graves mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Ummm... So, was something written
on the graves mo? Kupi wants you
to show it for a bit mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0037
rows.name:
"Our treasure can pierce and
damage even the strongest of
bulwarks. It can also heal. 193"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0038
rows.name:
"Our treasure shall save all the poor, and
because of that, it shall become a flame
that burns everything to ashes. 128"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0039
rows.name:
"Our treasure is the sole power to
carve open a closed world... -1986"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0069
rows.name:
Momomomomo... It's another riddle mo...
What in the world does this mean mo...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0050
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask if the mysterious numbers written at the end have a meaning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask about the profound words inscribed on the gravestones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0033
rows.name: Mysterious numbers... Nnn...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Ah! Could this possibly be the coordinates
for the treasure's location mo?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0035
rows.name:
The first number is vertical, the second number is
horizontal, and the third number is height... If
you think about it that way, it makes sense mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Yeah! Now that that's settled,
go go mo! Go fetch that amazing
treasure right away mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0040
rows.name:
It said it can pierce through
anything, so... maybe some kind of
strong weapon is hidden there mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0041
rows.name:
Besides, it seems like the numbers
written at the back are the coordinates
for the treasure's hiding place mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0042
rows.name:
Yeah! Kupi wants you to go fetch it
immediately mo! Kupi will wait right
here, trembling with excitement mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0043
rows.name:
Go to the location of the coordinates written
on the grave mo! Surely the Riddle Alien's
incredible treasure is sleeping there mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0044
rows.name:
How was it mo? Did you obtain
the Riddle Alien's treasure mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Hn? For something that's
supposed to destroy the world,
it's in a rather small box mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0046
rows.name:
...Mo! There's a keyhole here mo. Insert
the key we got from the Riddle Alien...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0047
rows.name:
Oh! It opened, but... what's this mo?
There's just one strange book inside mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0070
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Kupi to read it.

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0080
rows.name: Indifference

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0081
rows.name: State that it doesn't matter and demand your reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0048
rows.name:
That's right mo! Anyway, if
the riddle is solved, Kupi can
finally sleep soundly mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0049
rows.name:
Wait a moment mo. Kupi will try to
translate the book right away mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0050
rows.name:
What unbelievable apathy mo... Kupi
was so curious about the riddles that
Kupi couldn't sleep every night...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0051
rows.name:
Kupi is just a little bit jealous
of your zero curiosity mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0052
rows.name:
But Kupi could never do that
mo. Kupi will try translating
the book right away mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0053
rows.name: ...Hnn... Hnn hnn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0054
rows.name:
I see... It seems this is a
book written about the thing
they cherish the most mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0055
rows.name:
"Our treasure can pierce and
damage even the strongest of
bulwarks. It can also heal."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0056
rows.name:
"Our treasure shall save all the poor,
and because of that, it shall become a
flame that burns everything to ashes."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0057
rows.name:
"Our treasure is the sole power
to carve open a closed world..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0058
rows.name:
"That is... Love. No matter what predicament
we face, to ensure we never eternally forget
the light that illuminates our path..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0059
rows.name:
"I record our love in this book. So that
it may become a guidepost for us... as we
wander the cosmos like lost children..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0060
rows.name:
It feels like something deep
is written there, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0061
rows.name:
Kupi completely doesn't understand
the meaning mo! Do you understand
the meaning of this book mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0091
rows.name: Explain the preciousness of love to Kupi.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev080101_SEL0101
rows.name: Shake your head and say you don't understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0062
rows.name:
You're amazing to be able to immediately explain
such difficult text mo! You could be a translator
mo! ...But Kupi still doesn't get it at all mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0063
rows.name:
You don't understand it either mo?
Phew... The Riddle Aliens remained
a riddle until the very end mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0064
rows.name:
Mmm... Kupi still feels foggy
about it mo... But thank you for
doing all this work for Kupi mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0065
rows.name:
...Come to think of it, when Kupi was
treating the Riddle Alien to food...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0066
rows.name:
"Our treasure... It may be something
that you all already possess..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0067
rows.name:
That's what they said mo.
Does that mean Kupi and the
others possess love too mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080101_MSG0068
rows.name:
Somehow, that's also... a riddle
mo. It seems like the sleepless
nights will continue mo...[ST:wait ]
